name: Sales of Goods Agreement
description: A commercial contract outlining the terms, conditions, and warranties for the sale and purchase of goods.
content:
SALES OF GOODS AGREEMENT

This Sales of Goods Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between the Seller and the Buyer named below.

1. THE PARTIES

A. SELLER
Company / Name: {{seller_name}}
Address: {{seller_address}}
Tax ID / Reg No: {{seller_tax_id}}
Phone: {{seller_phone}}

B. BUYER
Company / Name: {{buyer_name}}
Address: {{buyer_address}}
Tax ID / Reg No: {{buyer_tax_id}}
Phone: {{buyer_phone}}

2. DESCRIPTION OF GOODS

The Seller agrees to sell, and the Buyer agrees to purchase, the following goods (the "Goods"):

{{description_of_goods}}

Quantity: {{quantity}} {{quantity_unit}}

3. PURCHASE PRICE AND PAYMENT

The total purchase price for the Goods is {{total_price}} (excluding applicable taxes).
Applicable Taxes: {{tax_rate}}%

Payment Terms:

{{payment_terms}}

Payment to be made via: {{payment_method_details}}

4. DELIVERY AND SHIPPING

Delivery Method / Terms: {{delivery_terms}}
Delivery Location: {{delivery_location}}
Delivery Date: On or before {{formatDate delivery_date}}.
Shipping Costs: {{#if (eq shipping_costs 'Seller')}}The Seller shall be responsible for all shipping and handling costs.{{else if (eq shipping_costs 'Buyer')}}The Buyer shall be responsible for all shipping and handling costs.{{else}}Costs shall be shared equally.{{/if}}

5. TITLE AND RISK OF LOSS

Title to the Goods shall pass to the Buyer upon: {{title_transfer_condition}}.
Risk of loss or damage to the Goods shall pass to the Buyer upon: {{risk_of_loss_condition}}.

6. WARRANTIES AND INSPECTION

{{#if (eq include_warranty 'Yes')}}

The Seller warrants that the Goods shall be free from material defects and conform to the agreed-upon specifications. This warranty shall remain valid for {{warranty_duration}}. Additional Warranty Terms:

{{warranty_terms}}
{{else}}

The Goods are sold "AS IS", and the Seller expressly disclaims all warranties, whether express or implied, including but not limited to any implied warranty of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose. The Buyer assumes all responsibility for inspecting the Goods upon delivery.

{{/if}}

7. FORCE MAJEURE

Neither Party shall be held liable for any failure to perform its obligations under this Agreement if such failure is caused by events beyond its reasonable control, including but not limited to acts of God, war, strikes, or pandemics.

8. GOVERNING LAW

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction of {{governing_law_jurisdiction}}.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement on the date first above written.

SELLER
{{seller_name}}

Signature: _________________________

BUYER
{{buyer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: delivery_terms
fields.label: Delivery Terms (Incoterms)
fields.placeholder: e.g., FOB, CIF, Delivered at Place

fields.name: title_transfer_condition
fields.label: When does Title (Ownership) pass?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Upon full payment, Upon delivery

fields.name: risk_of_loss_condition
fields.label: When does Risk of Loss pass?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Upon delivery to the carrier, Upon receipt by Buyer

fields.name: governing_law_jurisdiction
fields.label: Governing Law / Jurisdiction
fields.placeholder: e.g., State of New York, UK Law
